reason: Verified agent chat functionality by sending a math question and confirming correct response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260401-201717-jt4m" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded with landing screen displaying "Start a conversation with QA-20260401-201717-jt4m"
Verified agent status — Status shows "idle" as required
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input box — Message appears in the input field and send button becomes enabled
Clicked send button to submit message — Message sent successfully, session "Math Basics Question Session" created, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response (up to 180 seconds) — Agent processed message and returned response within 2 seconds
Verified response mentions "4" — Response displays "4" in the chat, which is the correct answer to 2+2
Took screenshot — Final screenshot captured showing complete interaction with agent response visible
